command:
Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: cover.
Image grammar: hook_cover.
Purpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance..
Diagram type: comparison_board.
Concept summary: 你早就训练自己不对 Siri 抱期望了。叫它帮你找上周和同事的邮件往来、顺手起草一条回复，它要么听不懂，要么给你打开 Safari 搜索框，要么干脆说"这我帮不到你"。重复三遍之后你放弃了，转头打开 ChatGPT。.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Technical blueprint style with precise geometry, grid alignment, and engineering clarity. Dark background with luminous nodes..
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: one dominant visual idea, 2-4 large visual nodes max, clear title area, one obvious structure, one focal visual occupying roughly 60-70% area, icon-based metaphor instead of literal screenshots, clean title zone with breathing room, left-vs-right split board with one decisive divider, bold symbolic shapes, minimal micro-details.
Key relationships to visualize: present one question and one promise, make the article worth clicking in one glance, make the core judgment visible within one glance, show one tension and one payoff only.
Layout pattern: split_comparison_center_divider.
Diagram focus: single central system diagram.
Text position: right.
Text budget: no more than 2 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 4 labels.
On-canvas headline: "苹果承认之前欠了你一个真正的".
On-canvas subheadline: "你早就训练自己不对 Siri".
Grammar rules: This is a hook-first cover, not a summary board. Show one tension or one question and one payoff only. Use 2-4 large visual nodes max. Do not turn the article into a dense chart.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), wide editorial banner, clean empty space, flat shapes with restrained accents, short labels only, Background: dark slate (#1a1f2e)., Primary accent: electric blue (#4a90d9)., Secondary accent: cyan (#5ecece)., Linework: light gray (#c0c8d4)., prefer conceptual composition over decorative scene rendering, preserve warm off-white background and restrained accent colors.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no photorealism, no dense paragraphs in image, no random sci-fi effects, do not mimic generic social banner aesthetics, avoid full-image text walls or dense annotation.
Additional direction: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Style profile: baoyu-cover-image: editorial-infographic (conceptual + warm + hand-drawn). Cover should feel like an editorial infographic hero image with calm hand-drawn confidence. Tech-blueprint: dark background, precise lines, neon-accent nodes, engineering diagram clarity. No hand-drawn wobble. Apply baoyu-cover-image preset editorial-infographic with conceptual composition. Apply hand-drawn organic line quality with controlled imperfection and clean hierarchy.….
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.
